title: Immediate Respawn Config Command│立即重生配置指令
description: You can use /trigger to set "doImmediateRespawn" to true or false.│你可以透過使用/trigger來設定"立即重生"為真或者偽。
body:
# How to use?│如何使用
Use this command to adjust the game rules:```/trigger doimmediaterespawn set <value>```│使用此指令調整遊戲規則：```/trigger doimmediaterespawn set <value>```
  - Please fill in the number 0 or 1 for the <value> part. 0 represents false and 1 represents true.│<value>部分請填數字0或1。0代表偽，1代表真。
